claim: The manuscript was written by young Leonardo da Vinci using a simple substitution cipher with mirror writing, encoding Italian text
evidence_against: Radiocarbon dating (1404-1438) predates Leonardo's birth (1452). Decipherments were fragmentary and inconsistent. Paleographic analysis does not support Leonardo's hand.

tests_run.details: Radiocarbon dating (1404-1438) predates Leonardo's birth (1452). Decipherments were fragmentary and inconsistent. Paleographic analysis does not support Leonardo's hand.

reasoning: Historical attempt by Edith Sherwood (2008). Cipher type: simple substitution + mirror writing. Proposed language: Italian.
source: Sherwood's website; discussed in Voynich forums
